perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man wearing a newsboy cap, glasses, and a grey sweatshirt is positioned in front of the camera, talking and gesturing with his hands. A cartoon dog sticker appears next to his head briefly. (2) Transition to B-roll: a woman is shown smiling and looking at her smartphone while sitting in what appears to be a train station, followed by a shot of three people in outdoor gear being hoisted into a rescue helicopter. (3) The scene returns to the man in the cap, who continues to explain details while using hand gestures to emphasize points. More cartoon dog stickers and large text overlays appear periodically to highlight key phrases.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with upbeat, rhythmic electronic background music that maintains a steady tempo throughout. A male voice starts speaking in a clear, informative, and cautionary tone. (2) As the speaker continues, the background music remains constant at a medium volume, ensuring the vocals are the primary focus. (3) Occasional 'whoosh' and 'ding' sound effects accompany the appearance of text overlays and stickers, ending with a final emphatic statement from the speaker as the music fades.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Traditional Chinese subtitles appear at the bottom of the screen, mirroring the speaker's advice on travel insurance and infectious diseases. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: '就怕像這樣買' (Afraid of buying it like this) appears as an initial hook. '一毛也領不到!' (Can't even get a cent back!) is used to emphasize the risk. '小心' (Be careful) appears with a dog sticker for emotional emphasis. Brand identifiers like 'miko' and '3c有意思tim哥' are present at the top.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook -> Explanatory B-roll -> Detailed Breakdown -> Summary Warning

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male speaker, 1 female in B-roll, 3 people (appearing male/neutral) in helicopter B-roll
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged man wearing a checked newsboy cap, thick-rimmed glasses, and a grey sweatshirt with '1973' printed on it.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The main scene is a neutral indoor background with soft lighting. B-roll includes a modern train station interior and a mountainous outdoor landscape under a bright sky.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Contextual B-roll -> Evidence/Explanation -> Cautionary Outro
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To inform travelers about the nuances of travel insurance, specifically pointing out that statutory infectious diseases like the flu might be excluded from coverage depending on the policy and the timing of the infection. It serves as a consumer advisory video.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Consistent presence of the 'miko' brand logo throughout the video and the influencer's branded watermark.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: The speaker's signature newsboy cap and glasses, combined with the use of variety-show style dog stickers and bold colored text overlays.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses a 'talking head' format common in tech and consumer advice vlogs in Taiwan, utilizing B-roll to visualize potential risks like accidents or illness abroad.
